programme.desc: S1:E26 The Great Green Escape | Joe the Ostrich-Man | Cowed - Peabody decides to take part in the “Green Prisons in Bloom” campaign. When Joe learns that climbing ivy can grow 6 m high, he suddenly discovers he has a green thumb.

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E1 Jailbreak for Dummies | Hostage Havoc | The Informer - Joe is so fed up with his endless failures to escape that he feels blue. He doesn't even want to try anymore. Everyone notices how listless he is, no reactions, no appetite …

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E2 Invisible Daltons | The Daltons go cleaning | Crazy Firecrackers - Fabulous Falcon is giving the prisoners a lesson in Indian cooking. The dish Averell lunges at is so spicy that as soon as he tastes it, he sneezes so hard he makes a hole in the door! Joe tells his dim-witted brother to make the same dish again.

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E3 The Daltons afloat! | Twister | The Daltons go climbing - Fabulous Falcon is initiating prisoners in the art of divining water, and discovers a number of natural wells right there in the courtyard. Joe grabs his rod, with the intention of flooding the penitentiary.

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E4 Last Will | Signed, Stamped and delivered… | The Dalton Code - Miss Betty affirms that reading is thr best way to freedom, so Joe devours every book he can lay hands on in the prison library. However many books the Daltons read… nothing happens.

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E5 Free at last! | The Daltons aloft | Dog sitting - A legal error is discovered in Joe's trial. Peabody has to set him free. Joe promises his brothers that as soon as he's out, he'll find a way to help them escape. However, his attempts fail one after another…

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E6 Too many tunnels | Loony Daltons | Chain of Misfortune - The Daltons are in the process of digging an umpteenth tunnel to escape. But all those tunnels mean the brothers have turned the penitentiary's foundations into Swiss cheese. The obvious happens: everything collapses.

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E7 The Secret Passage | Zzzzzzzzz… | Sleepwalkers Escape - Joe has a dream about escaping with his brothers via a secret passage in the penitentiary. And the very next day, Miss Betty talks about the legend of the secret passage – one that would have been built by the penitentiary's first director.

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.desc: S1:E8 Hands off my rocks! | The Daltons go electric | The Wager - Averell finds diamonds in the new rocks that have just been delivered to the prison. Joe sees this find as a way to bribe a prison guard to help them escape (though he has to be found…).

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: Buddy's got a new trick up his paw – football. When Buddy's owner suddenly becomes his school's next quarterback, Buddy falls in with the huddle as well! The dynamite pairing of Buddy and Josh help carry the Timberwolves to the state championship.

programme.title: The King Of Comedy
programme.desc: A struggling comedian gambles his uncertain future on a crazy scheme to ransom his way onto television by kidnapping a popular talk show host.

programme.title: Love Sarah
programme.desc: Three generations of women, led by Mimi will need to overcome grief, doubts and differences to honour the memory of their beloved Sarah, while embarking on a journey to establish a new bakery in Notting Hill, a place filled with love, hope and colourful pastries from all over the world.

programme.title: Before You Know It
programme.desc: An unmissable New-York- based “dramedy” in the vein of Woody Allen. Stage manager Rachel (Hannah Pearl Utt) is the only thing standing between her family and utter chaos. She then discovers that her presumed-dead mother (Judith Light: Transparent) is alive and thriving as a soap-opera star!

programme.title: Bending the Rules
programme.desc: Theo Gold, the NewOrleans Assistant District Attorney, is about to have the worst day of his life. Not only does his wife decide to leave him on the eve of his birthday, but he manages to lose a high-profile case against Harry Blades (WWE Superstar Edge), an eccentric yet hardnosed detective.

programme.title: Our Take on Love
programme.desc: Designer Isabella and filmmaker Blake are both hired to work at the Godfrey Manor Gala. Will the romantic location and the love stories they uncover change their perception of love for the better?

programme.title: Just My Type
programme.desc: Vanessa and Amber bump into mystery writer Martin Clayborne. Can Vanessa's charm break down reclusive Martin's walls so she can secure an exclusive interview. (2020)

programme.title: Love's Last Resort
programme.desc: A woman leaves her immature boyfriend, hoping he will grow up and beg her to come back. However, six months later, she finds out that he's engaged to someone else.

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding shy artist Isla and confident salesman Mark team up to create a sculpture for Mark's his boss. As Isla spends more time with Mark, will his confidence rub off? (2022)

programme.title: Woman On The Edge
programme.desc: An investigative journalist discovers her sister's suicide may be connect to a series of recent murders that are set up to look like suicides. Starring Rumer Willis (2018)

programme.title: Midwife's Deception
programme.desc: A pregnant woman becomes concerned that her midwife may want to do more than just deliver her baby. Starring Katie Savoy (2018)

programme.title: Mommy Be Mine
programme.desc: After the disappearance of her daughter, a woman uncovers her friend's dark past. Starring Arianne Zucker (2018)

programme.title: Nanny Betrayal
programme.desc: After her husband has an affair with their nanny, a woman discovers that his co-workers are being killed off. Starring Michelle Borth (2018)

programme.title: Nanny Surveillance
programme.desc: A couple give their new nanny the codes to their home security system. The nanny then begins to torment the couple by controlling the smart home's system from her laptop. Starring Talya Carroll (2018)

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: Once upon a time, screenwriter Keith Michaels was on top of the world. But now, he's divorced, broke and hasn't written a hit film in years. His attitude slowly begins to turn when he meets Holly, a single mum.

programme.title: Bogus
programme.desc: When a young boy's mother dies, he invents an imaginary friend to accompany him to his new home far away. How can a boy be lonely with a gentle giant named Bogus? Gerard Depardieu and Whoopi Goldberg star together for the first time in this warmhearted tale of magic and fantasy.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Fun With Dick and Jane
programme.desc: After financial ruin, a married couple turn to crime to pay the bills.

programme.title: Off The Menu
programme.desc: An unlikely heir to a fast-food empire discovers a New Mexican town where foodies salivate over the culinary treats of a feisty female chef.

programme.title: Grandmas House
programme.desc: A teenager and her stepbrothers are forced to move in with Grandma. They learn the true meaning of love, faith, and family through the strict rules she imposes and the devotion she displays as the extended family has its ups and downs.

programme.title: The Outcasts
programme.desc: After falling victim to a humiliating prank by the high school Queen Bee, best friends and world-class geeks, Mindy and Jodi, decide to get their revenge by uniting the outcasts of the school against her and her circle of friends.

programme.title: Chocolate Covered
programme.desc: At the new super luxury hotel, Corinthia, in central London we'll take a tour of the hotel and the pastry kitchen where we'll see a cherry sauce and chocolate crème anglais being prepared to go with a stunning chocolate cake and chocolate martinis. In the hotel's fabulous piano bar, with the help of bartender Mario, Claire hosts a chocolate party. In the studio Claire makes chocolate beignets and her own chocolate martinis which are enjoyed by a small party of friends.

programme.title: Sox: A Family's Best Friend
programme.desc: A new family is having difficulty adjusting, when an adorable dog comes into their life. Once his special powers are discovered, the local dog catcher and the (F.B.D.I) Federal Bureau of Dog Investigation will stop at nothing to get him.

programme.title: Three Sisters
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand miles away from their beloved Moscow, Chekhov's Three Sisters live in virtual exile. Olga, a schoolmistress, attempts to support her siblings and the home that is the sole legacy of their late father.

programme.title: The Boat
programme.desc: A lone fisherman on his daily run finds himself lost in a thick fog which proves impossible to navigate. The worst is yet to come when his encounter with a seemingly abandoned sailboat becomes a fight for survival against an enemy unknown.

programme.title: Bottle Shock
programme.desc: The story of the early days of California wine making featuring the now infamous, blind Paris wine tasting of 1976 that has come to be known as "Judgment of Paris". Feat: Chris Pine, Alan Rickman & Bill Pullman.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Mexico, two very different women become a bank-robbing duo in an effort to combat a ruthless enforcer terrorizing their town.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: A comedy centered on three museum security guards who devise a plan to steal back the artworks to which they have become attached after they are transferred to another museum. Starring: Morgan Freeman, Christopher Walken, Joseph McKenna, Wynn Everett

programme.title: Star Kid
programme.desc: An unpopular boy comes across a fallen meteor containing an alien cybersuit that turns him into the kind of kid he's always wanted to be.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: A young girl finds herself in a reform school after therapy since she was blamed for the death of a young boy.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival. The only problem is, in the sixteen Earth years since the first humans landed on Rhea, two hundred and eighty-eight years have passed on the new planet and the existing population are no longer welcoming new arrivals, with the Rheans having set up a space blockade to shot down any ship that tries to cross into their territory. 'Earther', Bran, has big dreams of a better life in this new world, but the odds are stacked against him. Finding himself the lone survivor of a failed emigration attempt, his escape pod floats mindlessly in space and his oxygen is running low. His only chance of survival is to hook up to a rogue Rhean supply ship called The Nysa running on auxiliary power. But after finding the crew on board The Nysa dead, it seems Bran may have more than just a hostile planet to worry about. An intense interstellar thriller with an impressive cast, including Stephen Moyer (True Blood), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers) and John Rhys-Davies (the Indiana Jones and Lord of the Rings franchises).

programme.title: The Way
programme.desc: Martin Sheen plays Tom, an American doctor who comes to France to collect the remains of his adult son who was killed in the Pyrenees in a storm while walking The Camino de Santiago - also known as 'The Way of Saint James'. Driven by his desire to understand his lost son, Tom decides to embark on the historical pilgrimage, leaving his California life behind. Armed only with his son's backpack and guidebook, he begins the 800km historical pilgrimage but soon discovers that he won't be alone on this journey - he meets other pilgrims from around the world, all broken and looking for greater meaning in their lives. From the hardship experienced along "The Way" an unlikely group of misfits are bonded and Tom begins to learn the difference between 'The life we live and the life we choose.'

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: It's a Boy Girl Thing
programme.desc: It's A Boy Girl Thing is a brilliantly funny romantic comedy about next-door neighbours who live worlds apart. Woody Deane (Zegers) and Nell Bedworth (Armstrong) are life long sworn enemies who wake up one day to find themselves in a very strange place: each others bodies. In their switched identities, each sets out to destroy the other's high school reputation. When they start to succeed they get more than they bargained for. Sometimes falling in love can be an out of body experience.

programme.title: Extra Time
programme.desc: Former football star Troy is coaxed into rescuing the local footy team who have been told they will have to merge with a rival club or fold. Troy takes the controversial decision to team up with a nearby refugee support centre and take the community on a journey of change. But for some, it proves challenging. A hilarious and heart-felt comedy described as The Full Monty for the football pitch.

programme.title: My Days of Mercy
programme.desc: A heart-wrenching tale of finding love in the least-likely of places. Starring Academy Award nominee Elliot Page (The Umbrella Academy) and Kate Mara (TVs House of Cards). Two women from opposite sides of fierce protests meet on the picket lines and form an unlikely friendship. While dealing with their respective issues they grow ever closer, leading to a life changing romance.

programme.title: Hold Your Breath
programme.desc: Set on the rooftops of Paris, this gripping, high concept disaster thriller stars Olga Kurylenko (Quantum of Solace) and Romain Duris (All the money in the world). When an earthquake hits Paris, a deadly toxic mist appears, killing the inhabitants of the city. Surviving in the chaos, Mathieu and Anna must face the fog to save their daughter, who is trapped in a medical tank.

programme.title: Savage Justice
programme.desc: Newly engaged Shelby John (Jack Huston) and Ruby Red want a fresh start after their struggles with addiction, but when Shelby discovers his beloved Ruby dead on their porch, he embarks on a vengeful killing spree of the dealers who supplied her. Armed with nothing but adrenaline and a nail gun, Shelby begins to unleash chaos on the towns criminal underbelly, as he hunts down crime lord Coyote (Quavo). Sheriff Church (Robert De Niro) must race against the clock to put an end to Shelby's vigilante justice before the entire town descends into a bloodbath

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: Playing For Keeps is a romantic comedy about a former soccer star who returns home to put his life back together. Looking for a way to rebuild his relationship with his son, he gets roped into coaching the boy's soccer team.

programme.title: The Wedding Arrangements
programme.desc: When talented botanist Violet needs help preparing flower arrangements for a high-profile wedding, she calls upon Jack, a handsome nature photographer who has taken over responsibility for his grandfather's flower shed.

programme.title: Crazy Kind of Love
programme.desc: A newly single mother relies on her son and his carefree girlfriend to rebuild her belief in love, even if it is the crazy kind.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Jessica Tucker, a widow and successful doctor, is trying to juggle work and family when she learns she's up for the top job at the hospital.

programme.title: A Snapshot of Forever
programme.desc: After leaving her big city life behind, wedding photographer Jessie Brookes is happier than ever. When famous actor Nate Brown shows up on her parent's vineyard for his sister's wedding, she quickly realizes that there is more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Royal Runaways
programme.desc: A prince doesn't want to become King after his father dies, so he hides at a winery as a handyman to follow his own path.

programme.title: Radio Rebel
programme.desc: Tara Adams is just an ordinary high school junior, except for one little thing. Tara has a secret identity-she's Radio Rebel, the most popular radio DJ in Seattle.

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: A young engaged man on the verge of success meets a beautiful woman he can inexplicably connect with in his dreams. Starring: Skyler Caleb, Meg Cionni, Tim Daly

programme.title: The Decoy Bride
programme.desc: A heart-warming romantic comedy about an ordinary girl who is hired to be the decoy for the most famous bride in the world.

programme.title: A Warm December
programme.desc: An African-American doctor falls in love with the niece of an African ambassador during his vacation in London, but it turns out that she is suffering from a rare terminal illness.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Love Surreal
programme.desc: Abby is a promising art student whose long-term relationship with her perfect—but imaginary—boyfriend Sy is going strong, until fellow student Quinn enters the picture. Trapped into tutoring Quinn, Abby begins to fall for this flawed but flesh-and-blood reality. Now Abby must decide if she's ready for a real chance at love—and if she can let go of Sy.

programme.title: Finding Grace
programme.desc: A troubled teenage girl is forced to provide community service in a retirement home. As she develops a friendship with one of the residents and becomes closer to her father, she discovers the power of family, hope and faith.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: American doctor Ivy Miller lives in Bali, working at a charitable health clinic. When a billionaire benefactor named Dylan Donnelly arrives, Ivy is less than impressed. He is only interested in making himself look better by appearing charitable. Ivy is happy when he goes on his way, but then an accident injures one of Dylan's trusted advisors, Blake. Dylan insists Ivy stay at Dylan's lavish estate in Bali to care for Blake until he's well.

programme.title: A Professor's Vengeance
programme.desc: Nicole returns to graduate school, but someone on campus has his eye on her.

programme.title: The Wrong Teacher
programme.desc: Teacher and author, Charlotte Hansen has a passionate, one night stand.

programme.title: The Wrong Student
programme.desc: Kelly Halligan moves to CA with niece, starts business, and meets Coach Dominic.

programme.title: A Professor's Vengeance
programme.desc: Nicole returns to graduate school, but someone on campus has his eye on her.

programme.title: Pure Country 2: The Gift
programme.desc: Three angels bestow the gift of song to a young girl, who must follow a series of rules in order hold on to it during her rise to fame and fortune.

programme.title: A Moving Romance
programme.desc: After inheriting her family's moving company, a young woman starts to clash with the manager who thought he was going to take over.

programme.title: Once Upon a Date
programme.desc: When top-notched real estate broker, Josh Donahue, is sent to buyout a community playhouse he unexpectedly falls for the owner forcing him to decide between the family business and true love.

programme.title: Offline
programme.desc: An online stalker torments a young woman.

programme.title: Smooch
programme.desc: A rakishly handsome "English Royal" comes to America for an arranged marriage, and ends up being mugged in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park and left with amnesia.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A woman verging on thirty and frustrated in a temp secretary job takes on a yearlong culinary quest: cook all 524 recipes in Julia Child's "Mastering the Art of French Cooking." She chronicles her trials and tribulations in a blog that catches on with the food crowd.

programme.title: Ricki And The Flash
programme.desc: A heart-warming comedy, starring Meryl Streep, about family coming together and experiencing the redemptive power of love and rock n' roll.

programme.title: The Meddler
programme.desc: An aging widow from New York City follows her daughter to Los Angeles in hopes of starting a new life after her husband passes away.

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: When a young woman becomes romantically involved with an older man, she must learn how to mother his children from a former wife, who is terminally ill with cancer. From the producer of FOREST GUMP, STEPMOM stars Julia Roberts and Susan Sarandon.

programme.title: Adventures of Gallant Bess
programme.desc: Ted Daniels, a ranch hand working for a rodeo, captures a magnificent wild horse that he tames and trains. As Ted is recovering from an accident that happened during a rodeo, the rodeo owner cheats him out of his horse.

programme.title: Showdown At Williams Creek
programme.desc: A British soldier decides to move to the American frontier and start a new life. He finds the frontier tough and struggles with the climate, thieves and swindlers. He is accused of murder and put on trial.

programme.title: Pawnee
programme.desc: Pale Arrow is a white man raised since a boy by the Pawnee Chief. With wagon trains now encroaching on Pawnee land, the Chief sends Pale Arrow to be with the white people.

programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands
programme.desc: An avenging outsider riddles a gang of ruthless bandits in revenge for the murder of his family.

programme.title: Little Big Horn
programme.desc: In 1876 Montana, Capt. Phillip Donlin's duty in the Great Sioux Wars strains his marriage as his wife, Celie, has an affair with Lt. Haywood. Overhearing their plans to flee, Donlin is heartbroken but continues his mission to warn General Custer of a massive Sioux buildup. Defying orders, he presses on, racing against time to reach Custer before disaster strikes.

programme.title: Heavens Above!
programme.desc: Amanda occasionally baby-sits for friends and neighbors, so when the newly-arrived couple in the village ask her to sit for them, she accepts.

programme.title: MAN IN THE MOON
programme.desc: Scientists are looking for a man to send up to be the first man on the moon.

programme.title: ONE WAY OUT
programme.desc: Superintendent Harcourt is investigating the suicide of a woman who is found wearing a valuable necklace recently reported stolen. Harcourt sets about battling against, Danvers, a crook that will do anything to stay out of prison.

programme.title: HIDDEN HOMICIDE
programme.desc: On the surface of a seaside holiday camp, it would appear that all those there have come for fun, dancing and swimming. But under this shallow facade are a group of people who have gone there either for excitement or escape.

programme.title: Intruder
programme.desc: Wolf Merton, a London stockbroker with a fine war record as Colonel of a Tank Regiment, has since lost touch with all the men who served under his wartime command. One evening he returns to his Belgravia home and finds that there is an 'intruder' in the house.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: A signal from the other side of the universe is received by a hive-like society. Two scientists, Cane and Eva, are chosen to leave home and journey many light years to find and colonise the distant world that sent this transmission.

programme.title: The Intergalactic Adventures of Max Cloud
programme.desc: When video-game enthusiast, Sarah (Isabelle Allen), is transported into her favorite game, she finds herself on an intergalactic prison, home to the most dangerous villains in the galaxy.

programme.title: Proximity
programme.desc: Close Encounters of the Third Kind' meets 'Independence Day'. Earth is in danger and a loner named Isaac holds the key to unravelling the mystery that will expose the truth behind alien abduction.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Two immortally linked souls transcend the boundaries of time and space, one desperately searching for the answers that will save the other, and deliver the promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Wind Chill
programme.desc: Two college students share a ride home for the holidays. When they break down on a deserted stretch of road, they're preyed upon by the ghosts of people who have died there.

programme.title: Wild Things II
programme.desc: Rich, 17 year old wild thing Brittney is devastated that she loses her inheritence to a classmate, Maya. An insurance investigator uncovers the two girls plan, and soon the three are involved in a steamy relationship of sex, money and people being fed to aligators.

programme.title: Flatliners
programme.desc: Medical students experiment on "near death" experiences that involve past tragedies until the dark consequences begin to jeopardize their lives.

programme.title: Wind Chill
programme.desc: Two college students share a ride home for the holidays. When they break down on a deserted stretch of road, they're preyed upon by the ghosts of people who have died there.

programme.title: The World We Make
programme.desc: 18 year old Lee (a spirited equestrian) and Jordan (an academic and football standout) are at the threshold of building a life together. But their character is tested when racial bias surfaces in their otherwise progressive small town.

programme.title: To The Wonder
programme.desc: After falling in love in Paris, Marina and Neil come to Oklahoma, where problems arise. Their church's Spanish-born pastor struggles with his faith, while Neil encounters a woman from his childhood.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Chronicling the adventures of an eccentric, resilient and tight-knit family, THE GLASS CASTLE is a remarkable story of unconditional love.

programme.title: The Missing Sister
programme.desc: When Sharon finally tracks down her missing sister Raven, she's elated to be back together – until she begins to suspect that Raven isn't her sister at all, but rather an opportunistic imposter.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme and Raul Julia star in this explosive action-adventure based on one of the most successful interactive games of all time. Street Fighter begins in a world on the brink of chaos, as a civil war in the southeast Asian nation of Shadaloo threatens to erupt into global conflict.

programme.title: 500 MPH Storm
programme.desc: At 500 MPH disaster is inevitable. When an experiment goes disastrously wrong, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A scientist must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe America off the map.

programme.title: Badland
programme.desc: A gunslinging lawman (Kevin Makely) is hired by a US Senator (Tony Todd) to track down Civil War criminals (Trace Adkins, Bruce Dern, and Jeff Fahey). Armed with only his courage and a revolver, he roams the Old West serving up cold-blooded justice.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When one of Tim's team-building events turns competitive, Georgie gets stuck partnering with Jade's cocky rival. programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E9
programme.desc: When a Banshee's cry foretells Sean Kavanaugh's (guest star Randal Edwards) imminent death, Bo (Anna Silk) and Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) are enlisted in his plan to reconcile with his estranged brother. Meanwhile, Dyson (Kris Holden-Ried) presses Trick (Richard Howland) to reveal the secrets of Bo's Fae lineage.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E10
programme.desc: As an investigation into a young woman's mysterious suicide leads Bo (Anna Silk) to an experienced succubus named Saskia (guest star Inga Cadranel), Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) is recruited to help Trick (Rick Howland) recover a valuable Fae artifact he's lost.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E11
programme.desc: After Dyson (Kristen Holden-Ried) can't recall attacking a dark Fae he is suspected of killing, Bo (Anna Silk) and Kenzi's (Ksenia Solo) investigation brings them face to face with their vampire nemesis, Vex (guest star Paul Amos), whose eerie nightclub holds the key to the brutal murder.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E4
programme.desc: Dyson has to submit to therapy at the cop shop when his romantic frustration over Bo causes anger issues, leading him and Bo to patch things up.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E5
programme.desc: When a Dark Fae casino owner is nearly wiped out by an inexplicably lucky human, he offers Bo (Anna Silk) a chance to learn about her past in exchange for her help. And after Bo and Dyson (Kris Holden-Ried) are pitted against an evil Fae with body-snatching powers, a teenage oracle's glimpse into Bo's past reveals the chilling truth about her missing Fae mother.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E6
programme.desc: When Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) unwittingly eats the remains of a contaminated corpse, Bo (Anna Silk) and Lauren (Zoie Palmer) must find a cure for her deadly case of hemorrhagic fever before it's too late.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E7
programme.desc: When she's unwittingly bitten by a powerful Fae spider, Kenzi's (Ksenia Solo) paranoid delusions turn her against Bo (Anna Silk). And as Lauren (Zoie Palmer) calls in an exterminator to end the spider's killing spree, Dyson (Kris Holden-Ried) must act fast to keep his friends from being wiped out, too.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E8
programme.desc: Bo's freelance work earns her a lead on someone who might know something about her mother... but the trail ends at Lou Ann, a death row inmate who claims not to know anything about Bo. Desperate to prove otherwise, and increasingly convinced Lou Ann is innocent Bo uses all her political wiles to try and bust her out of jail. When she has to admit defeat, Bo's goal switches to one of personal vengeance: to find Vex, the Fae that framed Lou Ann, and make him pay.

programme.desc: Arjun spends time with Preeta and the Aroras. When he returns home, Anjali overhears him confessing his feelings for Preeta alone in the car.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: The Good Son
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Untangled
programme.desc: Diya, a gully badminton player, meets Arjun, a former badminton champ from an affluent family, who resents his own kin. Will Diya bring back the much-needed positivity and hope in Arujns life?

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: War Crimes of the Liberators
programme.desc: US soldiers fought for democracy and the freedom of other nations. Yet in the course of military operations, they too committed war crimes. Most of them never followed up on let alone punished. In the wake of the Allies' advance against Hitler's tyranny, there were numerous atrocities committed by the victors, not only in the East. Apart from their medals, some American soldiers also kept a dark secret. GIs killed German Prisoners of War and raped thousands of German women. Estimates of the number of German victims vary widely, and are highly disputed among experts. Not least because they touch on a taboo, since for decades in Germany the subject had been considered as a potential strain on the relation between the Federal Republic of Germany and its Western Allies. According to some historians there were several thousand sexual assaults by American soldiers in Bavaria alone when US forces liberated the region in April 1945. At some invasion beaches in Normandy, only every second germen POW survived. Often, the liberators – shocked by the sight of German atrocities – would fall into a spiral of violence. Very few of these crimes came under investigation by US military courts. Studies by the US War Department hinting at a comparatively high number of transgressions were classified secret.

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Deadly Waters: “... all the waters that were in the river [Nile] were turned to blood. And all the fish that was in the river died,” reports the Bible, “and the river stank, and the Egyptians could not drink of the water of the river.” (Exodus 7:20–21).

programme.title: Deserts On The Move
programme.desc: Deserts On The Move - Europe: Most school textbooks continue to recite the conventional wisdom that Europe does not have any deserts. They are out of date. Portugal, Spain, Italy and Greece are four EU countries that are already so badly affected that they have joined the United Nations Convention to Combat Desertification (CCD).

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Flight from Egypt: Although nine disastrous plagues had already devastated the land along the Nile, Pharaoh remained stubborn and would not release Moses and his people from slavery. And so their God, Yahweh, planned his final assault: At midnight, he sent death over Egypt – all the firstborn, Man or beats, had to die … there was no escape.

programme.title: Pioneers, Season 1
programme.desc: Pioneers, Season 1 - The Triumph of the Turbojet: They are the Queens of the skies. Within minutes they reach heights of more than 30,000 feet. Soaring high above the clouds, travelling from place to place, these gigantic birds of shining steel cross seas, mountains and deserts, carrying millions of people around the globe. All this is made possible by high-performance jet engines.

programme.title: Zero Hour
programme.desc: At the end of the Second World War the cards in global politics were reshuffled. The Allies now made a clear distinction between the friends and foes of democracy. The situation became critical for Franco, because in Spain many suffered from his reign of terror. For that reason, there were many who wanted to topple him.

programme.title: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Secret Societies - The Code of the Illuminati: Since Dan Brown's bestselling novel ‘Angels & Demons', the secret society of the Illuminati has been known to millions. Founded in Ingolstadt in May 1776, the secret society was committed to changing the prevailing systems. The founder, Adam Weishaupt, was a renowned philosopher and theologian who didn't just fight against the oppressive dogmas of the church, but also against the totalitarian forms of government that existed at the time.

programme.title: Pigeons
programme.desc: Pigeons and New Yorkers go back centuries. Like most New York City relationships…it's complicated. Some adore them while others just can't stand them.

programme.title: Empire State Building

programme.title: Ports

programme.title: Skyscrapers

programme.title: Food
programme.desc: New York has some of the best grub around, but getting that food to city kitchens is no easy task.

programme.desc: Fueled by a mixture of preparation, coordination, and bravery, The New York City Fire Department makes it safer for New Yorkers to be New Yorkers.

programme.title: Grand Central Terminal
programme.desc: New York is the heart of America's train system. At its center? Grand Central Terminal, whose Beaux-Arts style attracts both tourists and commuters alike.

programme.title: Roads
programme.desc: NYC might be the city of public transit, but its roads are just as important. Each day, the city plays host to an intricate dance of pedestrians, cyclists, and vehicles.

programme.title: Recycling
programme.desc: New York has a whole lot of trash, but half of it is recyclable. While New York might not be the best at it, its recycling system is state of the art.

programme.title: Electricity

programme.title: Water

programme.title: World Trade Center
programme.desc: Rebuilding the World Trade Center was the most significant project in New York history, one with no shortage of challenges.

programme.title: Pigeons

programme.title: The Meraviglia Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The Meraviglia is 315 metres long, weighs 80,000 tonnes and is capable of transporting more than 7,000 people.

programme.title: Queen of Denmark
programme.desc: Over the past 50 years, H.M. Queen Margrethe II of Denmark has met countless foreign heads of state. In this unique documentary series several of them share their memories and encounters with the Queen over the last 50 years.

programme.title: Nepal
programme.desc: In 2008, Nepal's royalty were ousted from power, forced out of their palaces, and the country began a new era as a republic. The story of the fall of the House of Shah is one of bloodshed, betrayal and intrigue. The transformation from kingdom to republic was swift, dramatic, and leaves huge questions unanswered about the future.

programme.title: The Queen and Prince Philip
programme.desc: Celebrating the Golden Wedding Anniversary of the Queen and Prince Philip, this programme is a sympathetic look at not only their lives together, but also an insight into Britain and the changes it has gone through in 50 Glorious Years.

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Many simple questions about the fatal night of August 31st have never been asked. By the end not only Princess Diana but also Dodi Al Fayed and the driver Henri Paul were dead. First, police blamed the paparazzi for causing the accident. They had been "buzzing round the car like flies." Then 48 hours later they blamed the driver of the Mercedes, Henri Paul. He was said to be three times over the drink limit. This compelling program seeks to answer the many questions overlooked by the enquiry and to uncover what really happened the night Diana died.

programme.title: The Story of Wallis Simpson
programme.desc: Meet Hugo Vickers, royal historian to Queen Elizabeth. Hugo's close relationship with the Royal Family gives a riveting perspective on what was happening behind the scenes. We learn how Wallis was seen by the royals and intimate details about the duke and Duchesses' life. We also hear from family and others from Wallace's past who reveal a new side of the story never told before.

programme.title: The House of Grimaldi
programme.desc: Unusual insights into the history of this colourful princely family.

programme.title: The Splendour and Misery of the Last Tsarinas
programme.desc: "Splendour and Misery of the Last Tsarinas" tells the stories of German princesses who became Russian Tsarinas, starting with Princess Charlotte of Prussia. From Catherine the Great to the last Empress, these women were bound by strategic marriages, torn between duty and personal desires. The film focuses on Charlotte's life, interweaving the dramatic experiences of other Tsarinas. Love, power, and tragedy mark their paths amidst European politics.

programme.title: African Nostalgia
programme.desc: Wildlife photographer Valter Torri has always been fascinated by the unique atmosphere of Africa. In this film, colours are bright, the sounds of nature ring out - you can almost smell the dusty heat. Every frame is dramatic - the fiery sky, the flowing river and the elegant wildlife. But for Valter, this beauty is always tinged with longing - how to reconcile the modern world in which he lives with the timeless majesty of nature.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Wildlife guide, Craig accompanies Kristina to one of the wildest places in Zimbabwe – Chitake Springs, aka, Ambush Alley. They get up close to a huge bull elephant and Kristina has her first-ever sighting of endangered wild dogs.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina gets to tick off one of her bucket list dreams – the majestic Victoria Falls. Her guide Beano walks her through the history of the falls formation and they encounter some of the wildlife that live in the surrounding area. She zip-lines across the gorge and learns the integral role vultures play in the ecosystem.

programme.title: Penguin Party
programme.desc: From South Africa to Georgia and all across the southern hemisphere, the penguin party never ends!

programme.title: African Nostalgia
programme.desc: Wildlife photographer Valter Torri has always been fascinated by the unique atmosphere of Africa. In this film, colours are bright, the sounds of nature ring out - you can almost smell the dusty heat. Every frame is dramatic - the fiery sky, the flowing river and the elegant wildlife. But for Valter, this beauty is always tinged with longing - how to reconcile the modern world in which he lives with the timeless majesty of nature.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: The Beavers are back
programme.desc: The return of the beavers is one of the greatest success stories of nature conservation in Germany. Hunted for a long time and almost exterminated, today more than 35.000 beavers live in Germany again – and the trend is rising. But how did this happen? One gets to see the mostly nocturnal animals only rarely. Klaus Weißmann has spent more than two years tracking down the shy beavers and documenting their spread in Germany. Which ways do they use? What dangers are they exposed to? Step by step, this film tells the exciting and sometimes odd success story of the likeable rodents.

programme.title: Alpine Whistleblowers
programme.sub-title: On the Playground of the Marmots
programme.desc: These peculiar and roughly rabbit-sized rodents enjoy great popularity at the Großglockner in the Austrian Alps. Before the last ice age, marmots used to live in the lowland of Tirol, but with the melting of the glaciers they were driven higher up into the mountains – a trend that will continue given the current climate change. Today, they simply feel too warm below 800 meters. In spring, as soon as the temperatures begin to rise, marmots leave their dens after a nearly six-month long hibernation. After eating their share and recovering from the long fast, losing up to a third of their body weight, the most important thing is founding a family. And that sometimes involves rather fierce territorial conflicts amongst the males. As long as there is snow covering the meadows, the marmots run a high risk being out – golden eagles are looking for prey. But the marmots have an efficient warning system set up: while the group is feeding, several sentinels are located around the meadow, warning the others by shrill whistling. At the start of summer, the young ones will appear and need to be extra careful.

programme.title: Bear Essentials
programme.desc: We follow three young bears of different species – polar bears, brown bears and sloth bears (like Baloo, the Jungle Book Bear) – that inhabit dramatically varied landscapes as they find their way in the world. We look at how their mothers teach them the skills they need to survive and watch the many dangers they face. Their young lives are full of learning, moments of great tenderness and life-threatening drama. Over three years all of our bears, despite hardships and losses along the way, prove they have what it takes, they all have learned their bear essentials.

programme.title: Survival of the Fittest in the Alps
programme.desc: The documentary shows the survival strategies of various animal species in the high mountains of the Alps in winter. Despite freezing temperatures and limited food supply, chamois, red deer and snow hares manage to survive the cold months. Latest research reveals the amazing abilities the animals have developed to adapt to the extreme conditions and also how climate change is altering the behaviour of the alpine inhabitants.

programme.title: King of the Mountains
programme.desc: Aerial shots of mating Golden eagles, a clash between a Golden and a White-tailed eagle, and an intimate glimpse into their nesting grounds combine to create a spectacular film. Tracking these majestic birds reveals the wild nature of their hunting grounds, showcasing the diverse animal and plant life that share their habitat with the 'king of the skies.' Viewers are brought up close as the eagle effortlessly glides over forests and canyons, abruptly diving in a breathtaking pursuit of prey. Witnessing these birds in their natural habitats is witnessing them at their finest. Embark on a magnificent journey through the skies and landscapes with us.

programme.title: King of the Seas
programme.desc: The times where eagles have been seen as varmints are over. They are now perceived as an integral part of the food cycle. Due to the fact that the habitats of the sea eagles in Germany are largely found in the north-eastern regions that are rich in water, the movie accompanies the eagles to an island, home to hundreds of sea ravens, where they rob the baby sea ravens of their food. They seem to always profit from the successes of the fellow creatures in their habitats. This film introduces you to the expert poachers of the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Snowy Owl: Queen of the North
programme.desc: No other owls are capable of surviving the extreme conditions, whereas the snowy owl is able to hunt through six months of bright sunshine and six months of twilight. This film follows a pair of snowy owls as they breed on the tundra of the High Arctic, 300 miles inside the Arctic Circle. Lemming numbers are low this year. Five owlets hatch and they face a struggle if any are going to survive.

programme.title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Baltimore
programme.desc: Baltimore is more than a city. It's a tapestry of tight neighborhoods, giving travelers an exceptional diversity of experiences. This city boasts resilience and a DIY spirit that's infectious. Yes, Baltimore has overcome incredible challenges, but what should be more well-known and revered is its place in American history, and its unique brand of easy going urban hospitality. See why Baltimore, Maryland is a place to love!

programme.title: Samanta Brown Places to Love: Cali Road Trip
programme.desc: There's nowhere quite like California for an epic road trip. With its constantly changing landscapes, you feel like you're somewhere completely new in just an hour or two. In this episode, Samantha kicks off her trip in vibrant, beachy San Diego and finishes in the rustic forests surrounding Big Bear Lake. Join her as she explores small towns, unique landmarks, and incredible businesses to see what makes California a Place to Love.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations South Florida

programme.title: The Travel Bug
